content.en:
"When I condense the fourth Eternal Realm Spirit in the future, the human race will have more Eternal Realm God Realms, and then the number of Eternal Realms of the Endless Realm Alliance will break through to more than a thousand!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Time flies.

Ten billion solstices have passed.

For many realm gods, just 10 billion to the Dao Era is just a time to take a nap.

And Ye Tian used this 10 billion Solstice Dao Era years to strive to improve the Eternal Dao Seed, and with the assistance of more than a dozen Eternal Demon Pillars, Chilin Ancient Spears and other treasures, he finally raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit.

At this time, it was difficult for the Eternal Dao Seed to improve even a little.

"It's time to condense the third Eternal Realm Spirit!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was going to cultivate the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit and condense the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit.

This time, he didn't have the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, and it would take a lot of time for the Eternal Realm Spirit Tree to be able to give birth to the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit.

Therefore, he could only rely on himself and the method of the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit Inheritance to break through the bottleneck and condense the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Tianyan Red Dragon.

This is the third Eternal Realm Spirit, not the first Eternal Realm Spirit, without the help of external objects, Ye Tian is not sure that he will truly break through.

So, he took out the Realm Spirit Dark Flower.

The Realm Spirit Darkness 910 Flower came from the Abyss of Despair, where he had found this treasure in the Abyss.

The Dark Flower of the Realm Spirit can assist in cultivating the Eternal Realm Spirit, allowing the Realm God to condense the third Eternal Realm Spirit, and the success rate is not bad, but its side effects are too great, and it can make the probability of the Realm God and Demon Seeding skyrocket.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not trade the Realm Spirit Dark Flower with other forces in exchange for the Eternal Demon Pillar.

But he had no problem using it himself.

Ye Tian swallowed a Realm Spirit Dark Flower in one gulp, and immediately cultivated the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit Inheritance Method, and began to hit the bottleneck, cultivating the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit within the Eternal Dao Species.

Rumble!!!!!

The power of the Eternal Dao Seed was continuously extracted, and the Heavenly Yan Red Dragon Realm Spirit Illusory Shadow was gradually condensed within the Eternal Dao Seed, and then the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit Illusory Shadow gradually condensed, while the Eternal Dao Seed gradually weakened.

Suddenly.

The Heavenly Yan Red Dragon Realm Spirit Illusory Shadow was not very stable, and at this time, Ye Tian manipulated the energy of the Realm Spirit Dark Flower to pour into the Eternal Dao Seed, prompting the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit to stabilize, and also making the Eternal Dao Seed gradually recover, so that it would not be in an extremely weak state. (CGEF) "The effect of the Realm Spirit Dark Flower is very good!"

Ye Tian smiled.

While the Realm Spirit Dark Flower assisted him in breaking through, it was also trying to turn him into a demon seed, but it couldn't make him become a demon seed.

I don't know how long it has been, the Realm Spirit Dark Flower has been completely exhausted, but Ye Tian has passed the most dangerous moment steadily, and the breakthrough is about to be completed.

A few more days passed.

Rumble!!!!!

A third Eternal Realm Spirit appeared on Ye Tian's body, Tianyan Red Dragon.

An illusory and condensed crimson dragon appeared on its body, exuding an aura of terror.

This is the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit!

At the same time, Ye Tian also awakened the third perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, Tianyan Red Dragon Flame!

This Perfect Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique is an offensive Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, which has a terrifying incineration power, and with Ye Tian's control, it transforms Tianyan Red Dragon Flame into various forms.

Even, he can also combine Tianyan Red Dragon Flame with the Eternal Dao Secret Technique Ruin Sun Spear, and let Tianyan Red Dragon Flame turn into the Ruin Sun Spear, so as to make the attack power a little more powerful, but he can also make Tianyan Red Dragon Flame combine with the Ruin Sun Domain and become the Tianyan Red Dragon Domain.

No matter what kind of combination it is, it can make the effect of this perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Technique more terrifying, and the attack power is even stronger.

However, Ye Tian, who had just broken through, was still a little weak in the Eternal Dao Species.

After all, the Realm Spirit Dark Flower was still inferior to the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, and there was no way for him to completely pass through the period of weakness.

But at most, a few hundred million years to the Dao Era, he can completely recover.

But he didn't panic, even if he was discovered by other forces, they didn't dare to attack him.

He is not too weak, compared to the strength before the breakthrough, he is still not weak, and he can even exert more powerful strength.

In this way, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian has completely recovered, and his strength has far surpassed the past.

After that, he continued to improve the Eternal Dao Species, and the Eternal Dao Species continued to strengthen, and his strength was also constantly improving.

In addition, his physical fitness is far beyond the past, and he can easily hit himself in the past.

"Continue to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, it is estimated that it won't be long before I can pass the seventh round of assessment of the Xuanxing Holy Gate Inheritance Land!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

Past.

He didn't know about the Xuanxing Holy Gate, but now he knew the origin and strength of the Xuanxing Holy Gate in the realm of the gods.

The Xuanxing Holy Gate is one of the top forces in the realm of the Realm God Realm, and they all belong to the powerful category among the top forces.

At its peak, the Xuanxing Holy Gate had a total of more than a dozen Eternal Realm God Realm high-level powerhouses, more than a hundred Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level powerhouses, and the number of Eternal Realm God Realm beginner level Realm gods reached thousands, tens of thousands of ordinary Eternal Realm God Realms.

Such a terrifying force is unimaginable to him now.

However, in the original battle between the Eternal Realm and the Demon Seed Abyss, the Xuanxing Holy Gate took the lead in the battle, but was brutally defeated by the Demon Seed Abyss, resulting in the complete destruction of the Xuanxing Holy Gate.

In fact, in that battle at the beginning, it was not only the top force of the Xuanxing Holy Gate that was destroyed!

In the end, the Eternal Realm was still a miserable victory, and the Eternal Realm was abolished, and those forces were relocated to the Realm God Realm, which became the current situation.

Such a powerful Xuanxing Holy Gate, even if it is a place of inheritance, there must be a lot of opportunities inside.

Therefore, Ye Tian is looking forward to it.

Gradually, another period of time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian went to break through the seventh round of assessment in the inheritance land of the Xuan Star Holy Gate.

......

The seventh round of assessment.

Ye Tian traded with the figures in the seventh round of assessment, but his strength was still a lot worse, and he was completely crushed not long after killing them.

Obviously, there is still a big gap in his strength.

Eventually, he withdrew from the seventh round of assessments.

"My Eternal Dao Seed is still not strong enough, and it is estimated that I still have to improve to a certain level before I can hope to pass the seventh round of assessment!"

Ye Tian thought so.
